headline: Archer Daniels Jumps 52% in a Year: Key Factors Behind the Surge
summary: ADM's portfolio optimization, cost-cutting efforts and push into nutrition and value-added products are fueling investor confidence and stock gains.

raw.headline: Archer Daniels Jumps 52% in a Year: Key Factors Behind the Surge

headline: General Mills, ADM, Walmart Partner to Accelerate Regenerative Agriculture Across 40,000 Midwest Wheat Acres
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, CHICAGO & BENTONVILLE, Ark., July 15, 2026--General Mills, ADM and Walmart today announced a strategic collaboration to accelerate regenerative agriculture across 40,000 Midwest wheat acres.

raw.headline: General Mills, ADM, Walmart Partner to Accelerate Regenerative Agriculture Across 40,000 Midwest Wheat Acres

headline: Archer Daniels Midland (ADM) Stock Still Looks Priced At A Premium Despite A 63% Five Year Run
summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland stock has delivered a 63.3% total return over the past 5 years, yet both the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and the earnings multiples currently point to the shares trading at a premium rather than at a discount. A 63.3% 5 year return suggests Archer-Daniels-Midland has already rewarded long term holders. As a result, fresh buyers need to think carefully about how much upside is left in the current price.
